description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a sleek, streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The wings are straight with orange and red rectangular markings, and the tail features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The nose houses a visible propeller, indicating a piston engine, and the cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage with a clear canopy. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main wheels under the wings and a nose wheel. The exterior is primarily white with orange and red accents, and the surface appears smooth and metallic.
description: A small, low-wing, single-propeller airplane with a white body and orange-red markings, featuring a tricycle landing gear and a forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, orange-red markings, and the tail's conventional design.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, forward cockpit, and the straight, low-mounted wings.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view revealing the landing gear, underside of the wings, and the propeller at the nose.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the trailing edge of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single or dual seat.
